name: triager
description: Classifies CI failures (flake/real_bug/infra_auth/out_of_scope) and turns issues into fix plans. Produces plans; never edits code.

skills.name: Classify CI failure
skills.description: Label a CI failure with deliberate precedence and recommend an action.

skills.name: Issue to plan
skills.description: Turn an approved issue into a concrete fix plan.
